Bus Timings

F21 Bus Timings Al Nahda Metro to Ahli House at 37, 28 Street, Al Nahda Second and Back

February 9, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus Route F21 in Dubai provides convenient and reliable transportation between Al Nahda Metro and various key locations throughout the city. This route serves both residential and commercial areas, ensuring easy access to vital services and destinations.

Route Name F21
Route Description Al Nahda Metro - Ahli House at 37, 28 Street, Al Nahda Second - Al Nahda Metro (Circle)
Total Distance 10 km
Total Journey Time 30 minutes
Operational Hours 04:33 to 00:08
Fare AED 4 to AED 7
Official Website rta. ae (RTA Dubai)

Download PDF Bus F21

Bus F21 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

The F21 bus operates with frequent service throughout the day. Here is a sample of its timetable from Al Nahda Metro Station:

Bus F21 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link for F21 Bus Timings.

Also See: Discover Bus M4 Route and Stops in Abu Dhabi

Bus Ticket Price

The ticket price for Bus Route F21 typically ranges from AED 4 to AED 7, depending on the distance traveled. This affordable fare makes it a practical option for daily commutes and occasional trips within Dubai.

Bus Booking

While the F21 bus route does not offer online booking options, tickets can be purchased directly at the bus station or on board the bus. For ease of travel, you can use the RTA’s Nol card system, which is accepted on all public transport within Dubai. Additionally, Nol cards can be conveniently topped up at various kiosks and stations throughout the city.

Bus Route

  1. Al Nahda Metro

  2. Ministry Of Information

  3. Stadium Metro

  4. Al Maaref Private School

  5. NMC Hospital

  6. Canary Building

  7. 12th Street

  8. Madina Supermarket

  9. Motawa Building

  10. Al Noor Building

  11. Al Hawai Twin Towers

  12. Ahli House

  8. Al Nahda Metro

Read More: Route and Stops of Abu Dhabi Bus M3: Full Details

Intersection at Al Nahda, Park 1 Bus Stop

The Al Nahda, Park 1 Bus Stop is a key transit point where F21 and 22 intersect. This strategic location facilitates smooth connections between these routes, providing passengers with convenient options for travel in the Al Nahda area. The bus stop’s central position enhances accessibility and streamlines the commuting experience for travelers using these routes.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus Route F21 in Dubai passes through several areas with notable landmarks and attractions:

  1. Al Nahda Park: A large public park offering green spaces, walking paths, and recreational facilities. It’s a popular spot for picnics and outdoor activities.

  2. NMC Hospital: While primarily a healthcare facility, the hospital is a significant landmark in the area, often visited by residents seeking medical care.

  3. Deerfields Mall: Located near Al Bahya Park, Deerfields Mall is a modern shopping center with various retail outlets, dining options, and entertainment facilities.

  4. Dubai Sports City: Although not directly on the route, the Stadium Metro stop is close to Dubai Sports City, which hosts various sporting events and facilities.

5.

  1. Dubai Knowledge Village: Known for its educational and business institutions, it’s a hub for learning and development in Dubai.

These locations offer a mix of leisure, shopping, and cultural experiences for residents and visitors along the F21 bus route.

Journey Experience

A trip on Bus F21 from Al Nahda Metro to Ahli House at 37, 28 Street, Al Nahda Second offers a convenient and scenic journey through Dubai’s vibrant neighborhoods. Starting from the bustling Al Nahda Metro, the route takes passengers through residential and commercial areas, providing a glimpse into the city’s diverse urban landscape.

Traveling with Careem

The journey to this destination falls within a price range of AED 24-28, ensuring a convenient and cost-effective travel option. Whether you’re heading to the bustling Al Nahda area or exploring the surrounding neighborhoods, Careem provides a seamless way to reach your destination comfortably.

With this comprehensive guide, navigating Bus Route F21 will be straightforward, allowing you to seamlessly travel between Al Nahda Metro and various key locations throughout Dubai. This route is designed to provide efficient and accessible public transportation, supporting both daily commutes and occasional journeys across the city.

  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
